LanguageData.VQE_StingrayDrone.label: stingray drone
LanguageData.VQE_StingrayDrone.description: An automated heavy assault drone built on a large, armored aerial platform. It is equipped with a powerful, short-range incendiary cannon that fires a blast of superheated gel, causing area-of-effect flame damage. \n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. Unlike other drones, stingray drones don’t require connection to drone transmitters.
LanguageData.VQE_StingrayDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
